datasets.title: US County Boundaries
datasets.description: Simplified US county boundary polygons. Useful for choropleth maps, spatial joins, and administrative aggregation examples from Chapter 4.

datasets.title: AWS Region & Edge Locations
datasets.description: Point dataset of AWS regions, availability zones, and edge locations worldwide. Demonstrates geocoding and point clustering techniques from Chapter 3.

datasets.title: Urban Green Space Index
datasets.description: NDVI-derived urban greenspace index for major US cities. CSV with coordinates and computed metrics, illustrating the raster-to-vector workflow from Chapter 7.

datasets.title: Landsat Scene Footprints
datasets.description: WRS-2 path/row grid footprints for Landsat 8/9 scenes available on AWS Open Data. Demonstrates querying the public Landsat catalog from Chapter 6.

datasets.title: Digital Elevation Model (COG)
datasets.description: Cloud-Optimized GeoTIFF of 30m SRTM elevation for a sample region. Demonstrates COG access patterns and range requests on S3 from Chapter 8.

datasets.title: STAC Item Collection
datasets.description: Sample STAC (SpatioTemporal Asset Catalog) metadata for Sentinel-2 scenes. Shows how to work with open geospatial standards and AWS Earth Observation catalog.
